finds.description: Finders / Keepers: personal Instagram music finds. V1 batches default to and cap at 8 items.

live.description: Live / Vibes: personal live, DJ, event, and mood captures. V1 batches default to and cap at 8 items.

mixes.description: Mixes / Sets: manual clip/upload and SoundCloud/source-link captures. V1 batches default to 5 items.

fashion.description: Fashion Finds / Moodboard: Instagram/Pinterest/manual image references. V1 batches default to and cap at 8 images.
